result.stdout:
Usage: dotnet-operatorsharp [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help   Show help information.

Commands:
  build-crds     Builds the project and generates CRD yaml files for the custom
                 resources in the project
  generate-crds  Generates CRDs from a provided assembly into a provided output
                 folder

Run 'dotnet-operatorsharp [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Usage: dotnet-operatorsharp [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help   Show help information.

Commands:
  build-crds     Builds the project and generates CRD yaml files for the custom
                 resources in the project
  generate-crds  Generates CRDs from a provided assembly into a provided output
                 folder

Run 'dotnet-operatorsharp [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Builds the project and generates CRD yaml files for the custom resources in the project

Usage: dotnet-operatorsharp build-crds [options]

Options:
  -p|--project             ProjectFile
  -o|--output              OutputPath
  -k|--kubernetes-version  The version of the Kubernetes CRD API to target. This
                           must be either "v1" or "v1beta1".
  -?|-h|--help             Show help information.

commands.payload:

                           must be either "v1" or "v1beta1".
  -?|-h|--help             Show help information.

result.stdout:
Generates CRDs from a provided assembly into a provided output folder

Usage: dotnet-operatorsharp generate-crds [options]

Options:
  -a|--assembly            AssemblyPath
  -o|--output              OutputFolder
  -k|--kubernetes-version  The version of the Kubernetes CRD API to target. This
                           must be either "v1" or "v1beta1".
  -?|-h|--help             Show help information.

commands.payload:
Generates CRDs from a provided assembly into a provided output folder

Usage: dotnet-operatorsharp generate-crds [options]

Options:
  -a|--assembly            AssemblyPath
  -o|--output              OutputFolder
  -k|--kubernetes-version  The version of the Kubernetes CRD API to target. This
                           must be either "v1" or "v1beta1".
  -?|-h|--help             Show help information.
